HGSS.577.0000:
If you treat your Pokémon nicely,
they will love you in return.\f
Oh? Let me see your Pokémon...\f
HGSS.577.0001:
It looks really happy!
It must love you a lot.
HGSS.577.0002:
I get the feeling that it really
trusts you.
HGSS.577.0003:
It’s friendly toward you.
It looks sort of happy.
HGSS.577.0005:
You should treat it better.
It’s not used to you.
HGSS.577.0006:
It doesn’t seem to like you at all.
It looks mean.
HGSS.577.0007:
I keep losing in battles, and my
Pokémon end up fainting...\f
Maybe that’s why my Pokémon don’t
like me much...
HGSS.577.0008:
When I use an item on my Pokémon,
it acts really glad!
